description: Small notes regarding payments. Verso concerns a sum of 41 (dirhams?) owed by the scribe to his paternal uncle for a wasaṭ (belt). It seems that he still owes 21 out of the 41. This was recorded (presumably in a legal deed) in the last ten days of Ḥeshvan. Recto refers to wheat and a shop
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
